auth_algo.description: The algorithm that PayPal uses to generate the signature and that you can use to verify the signature. Extract this value from the `PAYPAL-AUTH-ALGO` response header, which is received with the webhook notification.

cert_url.description: The X.509 public key certificate. Download the certificate from this URL and use it to verify the signature. Extract this value from the `PAYPAL-CERT-URL` response header, which is received with the webhook notification.

transmission_id.description: The ID of the HTTP transmission. Contained in the `PAYPAL-TRANSMISSION-ID` header of the notification message.

transmission_sig.description: The PayPal-generated asymmetric signature. Appears in the `PAYPAL-TRANSMISSION-SIG` header of the notification message.

transmission_time.description: The date and time of the HTTP transmission, in [Internet date and time format](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339#section-5.6). Appears in the `PAYPAL-TRANSMISSION-TIME` header of the notification message.

webhook_id.description: The ID of the webhook as configured in your Developer Portal account.
